title: Some users may be unable to collect forensics in Microsoft Defender for Endpoint
impact: Users may have been unable to collect forensics in Microsoft Defender for Endpoint.

updates.content:
Title: Some users may be unable to collect forensics in Microsoft Defender for Endpoint

User impact: Users may be unable to collect forensics in Microsoft Defender for Endpoint.

Current status: We're reviewing service monitoring telemetry to isolate the source of the issue and establish a fix.
 
Scope of impact: Impact is specific to some users attempting to collect forensics in Microsoft Defender for Endpoint, who are served through the affected infrastructure.
 
Next update by: Sunday, February 22, 2026, at 11:00 AM UTC

Title: Some users may be unable to collect forensics in Microsoft Defender for Endpoint

User impact: Users may be unable to collect forensics in Microsoft Defender for Endpoint.

Current status: We’ve identified a long-term code fix that is expected to address this issue. We’re currently validating the fix to ensure it fully resolves the problem before proceeding with next steps. In addition, we're continuing to review service monitoring telemetry to isolate the underlying root cause of impact.
 
Scope of impact: Impact is specific to some users attempting to collect forensics in Microsoft Defender for Endpoint, who are served through the affected infrastructure.

Title: Some users may be unable to collect forensics in Microsoft Defender for Endpoint

User impact: Users may be unable to collect forensics in Microsoft Defender for Endpoint.

Current status: We've isolated a code and logic error during failing calls that’s resulting in high failure rates during the collection of forensics within Microsoft Defender for Endpoint. We've begun deployment of a code fix to eliminate the elevated volume of failures, and we aim to provide a timeline to remediation once available.
 
Scope of impact: Impact is specific to some users attempting to collect forensics in Microsoft Defender for Endpoint, who are served through the affected infrastructure.
